title: Idempotent Consumer — 4 Dedup Strategies
description: loan-processing-service. One panel pair per strategy: processed vs duplicate rate, so you can see each dedup mechanism actually catching redeliveries in real time.

panels.title: Events by Strategy & Outcome (rate)
panels.description: All 4 strategies on one panel — processed vs duplicate, per strategy. duplicate>0 proves dedup is actually catching redeliveries, not just passing everything through.

panels.title: Total Processed vs Duplicate (cumulative)
panels.description: Raw counts since this service started — a quick sanity check that every strategy has seen at least one duplicate suppressed.
